audio_duration_sec.name: audio_duration_sec
audio_duration_sec.description: Effective audio duration used for normalization; canonical flows prefer measured duration.

cer.name: cer
cer.description: Corpus-level character error rate after normalization and whitespace removal.

confidence.name: confidence
confidence.description: Average confidence exposed by the provider for the recognized utterance.

declared_audio_duration_sec.name: declared_audio_duration_sec
declared_audio_duration_sec.description: Reference duration declared by the dataset manifest or caller metadata.

duration_mismatch_sec.name: duration_mismatch_sec
duration_mismatch_sec.description: Absolute mismatch between measured and declared audio duration.

end_to_end_latency_ms.name: end_to_end_latency_ms
end_to_end_latency_ms.description: Outer wall-clock latency from request/segment/stream start to final result availability.

end_to_end_rtf.name: end_to_end_rtf
end_to_end_rtf.description: Wall-clock end-to-end latency divided by measured audio duration.

estimated_cost_usd.name: estimated_cost_usd
estimated_cost_usd.description: Estimated provider cost for the sample using the selected preset pricing metadata.

measured_audio_duration_sec.name: measured_audio_duration_sec
measured_audio_duration_sec.description: Audio duration measured from the processed file or bytes and used for canonical normalization.

preprocess_ms.name: preprocess_ms
preprocess_ms.description: Provider-side preprocessing latency before the inference stage.

provider_compute_latency_ms.name: provider_compute_latency_ms
provider_compute_latency_ms.description: Provider-reported compute latency from normalized ASR result timings.

provider_compute_rtf.name: provider_compute_rtf
provider_compute_rtf.description: Provider compute latency divided by measured audio duration.

sample_accuracy.name: sample_accuracy
sample_accuracy.description: Share of samples whose normalized reference and hypothesis match exactly.

time_to_final_result_ms.name: time_to_final_result_ms
time_to_final_result_ms.description: Wall-clock latency from request/stream start to the final result.

time_to_first_result_ms.name: time_to_first_result_ms
time_to_first_result_ms.description: Wall-clock latency from request/stream start to the first visible partial or final result.
